segments.scene_description: A static view of a medieval stone bedroom interior illuminated by candlelight. The room features a central bed with fur coverings, a wooden table and chair to the left, a dresser to the right, and a distinctive green window at the far end. The stone walls and wooden ceiling beams create a historic atmosphere, with an arched doorway visible in the background. No movement or action occurs throughout the segment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective within a medieval stone bedroom, preserving a consistent atmosphere of candlelit stillness. It begins by framing the interior's historic architecture, where heavy wooden ceiling beams and rough stone walls enclose a central bed draped in fur. The view remains fixed, allowing the eye to drift from the wooden table and chair on the left toward the dresser positioned on the right. This steady gaze then extends toward the far end of the room, where a distinctive green stained glass window casts a colored glow near an arched doorway. The scene concludes in this same state of absolute immobility, with the flickering candlelight remaining the only source of warmth in the silent chamber.
